steps.title: Translate daily distance to an inequality
steps.content: The whale travels 72 to 77 miles per day. Write this as: $$72 \leq \text{(daily distance)} \leq 77$$

steps.title: Scale to 27 days by multiplying by 27
steps.content: For the total distance $x$ over 27 days, multiply each part of the inequality by 27: $$(72)(27) \leq \text{(daily distance)}(27) \leq (77)(27)$$ Since $x$ is the total distance: $$(72)(27) \leq x \leq (77)(27)$$ That confirms B is correct.
